notes: All examples below are sampled from the SpamAssassin public corpus used for training.

samples.subject: Re: New Sequences Window
samples.body: I can't reproduce this error. For me it is very repeatable. This is the debug log of the pick happening and the command works correctly when run by hand with nmh-1.0.4.

samples.subject: [IRR] Klez: The Virus That Won't Die
samples.body: Posted article text about the Klez worm spreading on the web, with discussion of antivirus reports and a PC World link.

samples.subject: Re: [zzzzteana] Nothing like mama used to make
samples.body: Mailing-list discussion about pasta carbonara recipes, cream versus other ingredients, and personal cooking preferences.

samples.subject: Re: [zzzzteana] Nothing like mama used to make
samples.body: Reply discussing how carbonara is made with beaten egg and bacon or pancetta, and cooking by mixing egg with hot pasta.

samples.subject: Life Insurance - Why Pay More?
samples.body: Save up to 70% on life insurance. Promotional claims about free quotes, lowest rates, and unsubscribe/remove instructions.

samples.subject: [ILUG] Guaranteed to lose 10-12 lbs in 30 days 10.206
samples.body: Multi-link ad blast: weight loss, cancer risk, legal advice, singles community, photo album, plus list-removal link.

samples.subject: Re: Fw: User Name & Password to Membership To 5 Sites
samples.body: Adult club free-membership spam with fake account credentials, exaggerated membership stats, FAQ, and sign-up prompts.

samples.subject: RE: Your Bank Account Information
samples.body: Get-rich-quick gifting program pitch claiming rapid cash flow and large testimonial amounts after joining.
